name: @narada2/agent-pi-tui

scripts.test:baseline-live: pnpm --filter @narada2/cli build && pnpm run build && pnpm --filter @narada2/agent-web-ui build && node test/live-four-surface-acceptance-e2e.mjs --enable-live-e2e && node test/live-four-surface-acceptance-e2e.mjs --enable-live-e2e --pi-rpc
scripts.test:live:local: pnpm run build && node test/live-p0-durability-cancellation-e2e.mjs --enable-live-e2e && node test/live-p1-authority-negative-e2e.mjs --enable-live-e2e && node test/live-p1-controls-launch-binding-e2e.mjs --enable-live-e2e && node test/live-p1-mcp-faults-e2e.mjs --enable-live-e2e && node test/live-p1-pty-boundary-e2e.mjs --enable-live-e2e && node test/live-p1-transport-idempotency-e2e.mjs --enable-live-e2e && node test/live-p1-uncertain-admission-retry-e2e.mjs --enable-live-e2e && node test/live-p1-ambient-isolation-e2e.mjs --enable-live-e2e && node test/live-p1-provider-auth-faults-e2e.mjs --enable-live-e2e && node test/live-p1-compaction-reconstruction-e2e.mjs --enable-live-e2e && node test/live-p2-determinism-e2e.mjs --enable-live-e2e
scripts.test:live:production-binding: pnpm --filter @narada2/cli build && pnpm run build && node test/live-four-surface-acceptance-e2e.mjs --enable-live-e2e && node test/live-four-surface-acceptance-e2e.mjs --enable-live-e2e --pi-rpc && node test/live-p0-durability-cancellation-e2e.mjs --enable-live-e2e --production-launch && node test/live-p1-authority-negative-e2e.mjs --enable-live-e2e --production-launch && node test/live-p1-controls-launch-binding-e2e.mjs --enable-live-e2e --production-launch && node test/live-p1-mcp-faults-e2e.mjs --enable-live-e2e --production-launch && node test/live-p1-pty-boundary-e2e.mjs --enable-live-e2e --production-launch && node test/live-p1-transport-idempotency-e2e.mjs --enable-live-e2e --production-launch && node test/live-p1-uncertain-admission-retry-e2e.mjs --enable-live-e2e --production-launch && node test/live-p1-ambient-isolation-e2e.mjs --enable-live-e2e --production-launch && node test/live-p1-provider-auth-faults-e2e.mjs --enable-live-e2e --production-launch && node test/live-p1-compaction-reconstruction-e2e.mjs --enable-live-e2e --production-launch && node test/live-p2-determinism-e2e.mjs --enable-live-e2e --production-launch
scripts.test:live:e2e: pnpm run test:live:guard && pnpm run test:baseline-live && pnpm run test:live:local

description: Pi-style terminal projection client for a Narada Agent Runtime Server session
